scripts.docker:dev: pnpm docker:build && docker run -it --rm -p 3001:3000 -v $(pwd):/app -v /app/node_modules -e NODE_ENV=development -e REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 --name product-catalog-dev product-catalog-app:dev
scripts.docker:prod: pnpm docker:build:prod && docker run -it --rm -p 3000:80 -e NODE_ENV=production --name product-catalog-prod product-catalog-app:prod
scripts.docker:clean: docker system prune -f && docker volume prune -f
scripts.:dev:docker: pnpm docker:build && docker run -it --rm --name product-catalog-dev-hot --env-file .env.development -p 3001:3000 -v $(pwd):/app -v /app/node_modules -v /app/build -e CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true -e FAST_REFRESH=true -e WATCHPACK_POLLING=true -e NODE_ENV=development -e REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 product-catalog-app:dev
